title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
